debug_info.goal:
case hf.refine_2.right
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
this✝¹ : Ioc (2 * Real.pi) 0 = ∅
this✝ : Meromorphic f
this : Measurable f
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable
    (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖circleMap 0 1 y - f (circleMap 0 r x)‖| ∂MeasureTheory.volume)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

proof:
have h_mer : MeromorphicOn f ⊤ := fun x _ ↦ h x
        have H := ρ₃'' (r := r) h_mer
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h_mer)] at H
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using H.2
failed_attempts:
convert (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)).integral_norm_prod_left using 4
        ext x y
        rw [norm_sub_rev]
simpa [norm_sub_rev] using ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h)).mp (ρ₃'' h)).2
· exact int_log

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f _)]
        have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at this
        exact this.2.2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h.meromorphicOn)).mp (ρ₃'' h.meromorphicOn)).2

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at this
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using this.2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h.meromorphicOn)).mp (ρ₃'' h.meromorphicOn)).2

have H : MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun p : ℝ × ℝ ↦ log ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1) - circleMap 0 1 p.2‖)
            ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))).prod (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := by
          apply ρ₃
          · intro x
            exact (h _).comp_analyticAt (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r x trivial)
          · exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        exact H.integrable_norm.integrable_integral

rw [← smul_eq_mul, (circleAverage_log_norm_sub_const_eq_posLog (a := F x) (R := 1) (by norm_num)).symm]
                unfold circleAverage
                simp [intervalIntegral.intervalIntegral_eq_integral_uIoc, two_pi_pos.le]
              _ ≤ 4 * π * Real.log (1 + ‖F x‖) := by
                 suffices 0 ≤ 2 * π * Real.log (max 1 ‖F x‖) by linarith
                 apply mul_nonneg (by simp [Real.pi_pos.le])
                 apply Real.log_nonneg
                 simp
          · rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le two_pi_pos.le]
            apply intervalIntegrable_log_norm_meromorphicOn
            apply MeromorphicOn.sub (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1) (MeromorphicOn.const (F x))

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f (circleMap 0 r _))]
        exact (ρ₃'' h).integral_norm_prod_left
exact (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)).integral_norm_prod_left
exact (ρ₃'' (fun x _ ↦ h x)).integral_norm_prod_left

intro x
          apply MeromorphicAt.comp_analyticAt (h _ trivial)
          exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r x trivial
        have Hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (circleMap 0 1) Set.univ := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        have J := ρ₃ Hf Hg
        have M := ρ₂ Hf Hg
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff M] at J
        simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]
        exact J.2
exact (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)).integral_norm_prod_left

convert (ρ₃'' h).norm.integral_prod_right using 1
        ext x
        apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
        filter_upwards with y
        simp [norm_sub_rev]

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f (circleMap 0 r _))]
        exact (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)).norm.integral_prod_right

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]
        exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h)).mp (ρ₃'' h) |>.2

have H := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at H
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using H.2

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) (fun z _ ↦ h z)
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) (fun z _ ↦ h z))] at this
        exact this.2.2

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn
        rw [← MeasureTheory.integrable_swap_iff] at this
        convert this.integral_norm_prod_left
        ext
        simp [norm_sub_rev]

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at this
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using this.2.2

have hI := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff hI.aestronglyMeasurable] at hI
        convert hI.2 using 2
        ext x
        congr 1
        ext y
        rw [norm_sub_rev]

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) (fun x _ ↦ h x)
        simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (f (circleMap 0 r _)) (circleMap 0 1 _)] at this
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff this.aestronglyMeasurable] at this
        exact this.2.2

refine MeasureTheory.Integrable.congr (ρ₃'' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn).integral_norm_prod_right ?_
        filter_upwards with x
        refine MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae ?_
        filter_upwards with y
        rw [norm_sub_rev]

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at this
        convert this.2.2 using 3
        simp [norm_sub_rev]

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f (circleMap 0 r _))]
        have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)] at this
        exact this.2.2
successful_attempts:
have h_mer : MeromorphicOn f ⊤ := fun x _ ↦ h x
        have H := ρ₃'' (r := r) h_mer
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h_mer)] at H
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using H.2

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn
        simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f _)]
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h.meromorphicOn)] at this
        exact this.2

have := ρ₃'' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn
        rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h.meromorphicOn)] at this
        simp_rw [norm_sub_rev (circleMap 0 1 _) (f _)]
        exact this.2

simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]
        exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn)).mp (ρ₃'' (r := r) h.meromorphicOn) |>.2
